channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: ‘People Asking Why They Voted For UDF’: IUML Targets Congress Over Delay In Naming Kerala CM
item.description: Criticising the delay in naming Kerala Chief Minister, IUML leader P Abdul Hameed warned public dissatisfaction was growing.

item.title: Who is Manoj Agarwal? West Bengal chief electoral officer appointed as chief secretary by Suvendu Adhikari government
item.description: Manoj Agarwal has been appointed Chief Secretary of West Bengal under Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari's BJP government. He had previously overseen the Election Commission-mandated Special Intensive Revision (SIR) exercise in the state ahead of the assembly elections.

item.title: Redistricting war isn't over, Democrats say as Jeffries calls a meeting this week
item.description: Democrats are vowing to fight on after being dealt a series of blows in the partisan fight to redraw congressional maps ahead of the 2026 midterms.

item.title: Will hear Trinamool pleas on victory margins being less than deleted votes in SIR, says Supreme Court
item.description: This is the first Supreme Court hearing in the West Bengal SIR case after the election; in as many as 31 seats, the victory margins of the BJP were less than the number of votes deleted during the SIR, Trinamool leaders say

item.title: After Work from home, PM Modi suggests schools to opt for online classes as West Asia crisis continues
item.description: Prime Minister Modi urged citizens to support austerity measures amid the West Asia crisis, recommending reduced fuel usage, limiting foreign travel, and promoting local products. He suggested online classes for schools where feasible.

item.title: Tragedy at sea: MV Hondius captain praises unity amid hantavirus outbreak.
item.description: For unity and strength, a thank you message from the captain of hantavirus-stricken ship.

item.title: Three things in AI to watch, according to a Nobel-winning economist
item.description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. A few months before he was awarded the Nobel Prize in economics in 2024, Daron Acemoglu published a paper that earned him few fans in Silicon Valley. Contrary to what Big Tech…

item.title: Trump, congressional Republicans float suspending federal gas tax amid Iran war
item.description: Voters are souring on Trump's economy ahead of the 2026 midterm elections, and high gas prices are only adding to consumer discontent.

item.title: Continued uncertainty: Department of Energy circulates latest “retain/modify” awards list - Clean Air Task Force
item.description: Continued uncertainty: Department of Energy circulates latest “retain/modify” awards list Clean Air Task Force

item.title: There’s an Unhinged New Video Game About Trump and the Iran War
item.description: The game, developed by the group of anonymous artists known as Secret Handshake, is available online and in person in Washington, DC.

item.title: What does PM Modi's work-from-home call mean for the Indian stock market?
item.description: PM Modi's call for work-from-home amid rising fuel costs reflects concerns about India's economy. Analysts suggest it indicates a prolonged oil shock, with potential impacts on the rupee and fiscal deficit, and urge caution in investments.

item.title: Wall Street Veteran Yardeni Confident in S&P 500 Eclipsing 8,000
item.description: A blistering rally has pushed the S&P 500 Index back to all-time highs, and Wall Street veteran Ed Yardeni is confident the benchmark can breach 8,000 points by the end of 2026.

item.title: A New Hantavirus Vaccine Is in the Works
item.description: Since 2023, Moderna and Korea University have been developing a new mRNA vaccine for hantavirus. The work has been promising so far, but a finished product isn't likely coming any time soon.

item.title: Bandi Bhagirath’s case takes serious turn with Telangana CM ordering special team for comprehensive probe
item.description: Mr. Revanth Reddy questions why action was not taken so far when complaint was lodged on May 8

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire On "Massive Life Support"
item.description: US-Iran War Live Updates

item.title: Texas sues Netflix for advertising ‘bait and switch’ and spying
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has filed a lawsuit against Netflix, accusing the company of turning its back on its promise to remain ad-free and safe for kids. The lawsuit, filed on Monday, claims Netflix has "opened Texans' data for inspection by the same Big Ad Tech community it once criticized for exploiting users in […]

item.title: PM Modi to visit UAE, Netherlands, Sweden, Norway and Italy amid Middle East war — What's in his itinerary?
item.description: PM Modi's upcoming tour will strengthen India's ties with Europe and the Nordic region, focusing on trade worth USD 19 billion by 2024 and investment opportunities.

item.title: Modi’s austerity drive is an admission of failure on economic and foreign policy fronts, alleges Akhilesh
item.description: It appears the BJP government has completely lost control; the dollar is skyrocketing, and the Indian rupee has plummeted, Mr. Yadav said

item.title: Canara Bank posts a 10% decline in Q4 net profit
item.description: Canara Bank’s savings account deposits in the quarter increased 8.73% year-on-year to ₹3,66,581 crore

item.title: Oil price predicted to remain above $100 for rest of year
item.description: Investment bank JP Morgan expects oil to remain in the "low $100s" even if the Strait of Hormuz were to reopen next month.

item.title: AAP protests rising crimes against women in Pune; seek justice in two cases
India bow out of AFC U17 Women’s Asian Cup after quarterfinal loss against China - Firstpost
item.description: India bow out of AFC U17 Women’s Asian Cup after quarterfinal loss against China Firstpost

item.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Tuesday
item.description: Indian benchmark indices experienced a significant sell-off on Monday, marking their third consecutive session of decline. The Nifty50 and BSE Sensex both tumbled, led by banking, automobile, and energy sectors amid investor risk aversion. Analysts suggest a weakening trend with immediate support for the Nifty at 23,700.

item.title: Israeli attacks kill at least four in southern Lebanon
item.description: Israeli strikes follow forced displacement warnings for nine towns in southern and eastern Lebanon.

item.title: Google catches “first AI-assisted zero-day” as well as autonomous Android malware - Cybernews
item.description: Google catches “first AI-assisted zero-day” as well as autonomous Android malware Cybernews

item.title: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company poised to benefit from AI chip demand surge - Crypto Briefing
item.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company poised to benefit from AI chip demand surge Crypto Briefing

item.title: Chandrababu Naidu backs PM Modi's ‘seven appeals’ — says ‘national mission because of…’
item.description: Andhra CM Chandrababu Naidu supports PM Modi's national mission to strengthen India's foreign exchange reserves amid global challenges.

item.title: Dozens of Nigerian fishermen feared dead after Chad air strikes on Boko Haram
item.description: A fishermen's leader tells the BBC that 40 people are feared dead - either in the strikes or drowning as they tried to flee.

item.title: India Rejects Russian LNG Under Sanctions - Crude Oil Prices Today | OilPrice.com
item.description: India Rejects Russian LNG Under Sanctions Crude Oil Prices Today | OilPrice.com

item.title: Hantavirus cases spark brief surge in pharma and biotech stocks — here’s why trading is so volatile
item.description: The outbreak of Hantavirus on a cruise ship has led to biotech and pharmaceutical stocks surging on reports of firms developing vaccines.

item.title: SAP and Cyberwave Deploy Fully Autonomous AI-Powered Robots in Live SAP Logistics Warehouse | Corporate - EQS News
item.description: SAP and Cyberwave Deploy Fully Autonomous AI-Powered Robots in Live SAP Logistics Warehouse | Corporate EQS News

item.title: MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak prompts quarantine of 17 Americans at Nebraska Medical Center
item.description: Health officials said the Nebraska quarantine facility will assess passengers over several days before deciding whether they require extended isolation or can safely return home.

item.title: AI jobs growing almost by 15-20%: Ashwini Vaishnaw
item.description: As the demand for technology rises, India's IT industry is enjoying a remarkable boom in AI job openings, with projections showing a growth rate of 15-20%. This is accompanied by noteworthy investments in data centers, thanks to attractive tax benefits. The expansion of digital connectivity through innovative subsea cable constructions is further strengthening the nation's infrastructure.

item.title: Google stopped a zero-day hack that it says was developed with AI - The Verge
item.description: Google stopped a zero-day hack that it says was developed with AI The Verge

item.title: Indian Markets Fall as Oil Rally, Geopolitical Uncertainty End Five-Day Winning Streak - INDIA New England News
item.description: Indian Markets Fall as Oil Rally, Geopolitical Uncertainty End Five-Day Winning Streak INDIA New England News

item.title: American Bankers Attempt Last Ditch Effort To Kill Crypto Market Structure Bill Regarding Stablecoins - Bitcoin Magazine
item.description: American Bankers Attempt Last Ditch Effort To Kill Crypto Market Structure Bill Regarding Stablecoins Bitcoin Magazine

item.title: PM Modi to hold talks with UAE, Dutch, Swedish, Norwegian and Italian leadership in major tour from May 15–20
item.description: As the clock strikes May 15, 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi sets forth on a pivotal journey through Europe and the Middle East. His itinerary includes visits to the United Arab Emirates, Netherlands, Sweden, Norway, and Italy. Central to this tour is the aim to bolster trade relations, foster energy collaboration, and forge strategic partnerships.

item.title: Kathy's Beverages (Bobakat) Secures ₹6 Crore Pre-Series A Funding to Accelerate Expansion of Its Mumbai-Based Bubble Tea & Beverage Brand Across India - Roastbrief US
item.description: Kathy's Beverages (Bobakat) Secures ₹6 Crore Pre-Series A Funding to Accelerate Expansion of Its Mumbai-Based Bubble Tea & Beverage Brand Across India Roastbrief US

item.title: Early Lenskart investor Alpha Wave trims stake by 2.5% in open market
item.description: Alpha Wave Ventures reduced its stake in Lenskart through a major open market transaction, selling 2.46% holding in the eyewear retailer. Despite the stake sale, analysts remain optimistic on Lenskart’s long-term growth, citing strong revenue potential, operational scale and improving profitability outlook.

item.title: Iran denies proposal sent to US contains ‘excessive demands’
item.description: Iran says Tehran’s response to the latest US proposal to end the war was “not excessive."
